title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Go First Cargo

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Go First Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Fleet Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!
